<content>1: # AgentCube — Implementation Plan (AR-001 through AR-033)
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This plan covers all 33 Architectural Requirements for the AgentCube project (Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform).
6: 
7: ## Mapping AR → Specs
8: 
9: | AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
10: |----|---------------|-----------------|
11: | AR-001 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey session persistence |
12: | AR-002 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRDs, workload manager, GC |
13: | AR-003 | `session-routing/` | HTTP router, JWT, reverse proxy |
14: | AR-004 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd controller for idle sandbox cleanup |
15: | AR-005 | `code-execution/` | PicoD HTTP daemon for code execution |
16: | AR-006 | `ci-cd/` | GitHub Actions workflows, E2E scripts |
17: | AR-007 | `python-sdk/` | Python SDK (agentcube-sdk) |
18: | AR-008 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI tool (kubectl-agentcube) |
19: | AR-009 | `deployment/` | Helm chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile |
20: | AR-010 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer |
21: | AR-011 | `deployment/client-go.md` | Generated Kubernetes client library |
22: | AR-023 | `ci-cd/` | Pull request build verification |
23: | AR-024 | `ci-cd/` | Go lint on changed Go code |
24: | AR-025 | `ci-cd/` | Code generation check |
25: | AR-026 | `ci-cd/` | Go test coverage reporting |
26: | AR-027 | `ci-cd/` | E2E testing on Kind |
27: | AR-028 | `ci-cd/` | Python SDK unit tests |
28: | AR-029 | `ci-cd/` | Python lint |
29: | AR-030 | `ci-cd/` | Spelling check (codespell) |
30: | AR-031 | `ci-cd/` | Copyright header check |
31: | AR-032 | `ci-cd/` | Release image publication |
32: | AR-033 | `ci-cd/` | Workflow approval for first-time contributors |
33:

222: ## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)
223: 
224: ### Files
225: 
226: | File | Purpose |
227: |------|---------|
228: | `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
229: | `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
230: | `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
231: | `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
232: | `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
233: | `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
234: | `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
235: | `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |
236: 
237: ### Interface
238: 
239: ```go
240: type Store interface {
241:     Ping(ctx context.Context) error
242:     GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
243:     StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
244:     UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
245:     DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
246:     ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
247:     ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
248:     UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
249:     Close() error
250: }
251: ```
252:

257: - `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

# AgentCube — Implementation Plan (AR-001 through AR-033)

## Overview

This plan covers all 33 Architectural Requirements for the AgentCube project (Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform).

## Mapping AR → Specs

| AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
|----|---------------|-----------------|
| AR-001 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey session persistence |
| AR-002 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRDs, workload manager, GC |
| AR-003 | `session-routing/` | HTTP router, JWT, reverse proxy |
| AR-004 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd controller for idle sandbox cleanup |
| AR-005 | `code-execution/` | PicoD HTTP daemon for code execution |
| AR-006 | `ci-cd/` | GitHub Actions workflows, E2E scripts |
| AR-007 | `python-sdk/` | Python SDK (agentcube-sdk) |
| AR-008 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI tool (kubectl-agentcube) |
| AR-009 | `deployment/` | Helm chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile |
| AR-010 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer |

<content>1: # AgentCube — Implementation Plan (AR-034 through AR-043)
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This plan covers Architectural Requirements AR-034 through AR-043, building upon the foundation established by AR-001 through AR-033. These ARs focus on specific implementation details, edge cases, and extended functionality for each component.
6: 
7: ## AR Mapping to Specs
8: 
9: | AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
10: |----|---------------|-----------------|
11: | AR-034 | `ci-cd/` | E2E test setup details, Kind cluster config, artifact collection |
12: | AR-035 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI error handling, metadata validation, Docker/K8s integration details |
13: | AR-036 | `code-execution/` | PicoD JWT auth, file operations, workspace security |
14: | AR-037 | `deployment/` | Helm chart templates, CRDs, RBAC, Docker build args |
15: | AR-038 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd reconciler, annotation parsing, deletion logic |
16: | AR-039 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer FastAPI integration |
17: | AR-040 | `python-sdk/` | SDK clients, HTTP transport, session management |
18: | AR-041 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRD types, workload manager handlers, GC |
19: | AR-042 | `session-routing/` | Router proxy, JWT injection, health endpoints |
20: | AR-043 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey providers, atomic operations, indexing |
21: 
22: ---
23: 
24: ## AR-034: CI/CD Extended Requirements
25: 
26: ### Spec Reference: `specs/ci-cd/`
27: 
28: This AR covers detailed E2E test setup, Kind cluster configuration, artifact collection, and additional CI workflow behaviors.
29: 
30: ### Files to Create
31: 
32: #### CI Workflows (`.github/workflows/`)
33: 
34: | File | Purpose |
35: |------|---------|
36: | `.github/workflows/main.yml` | PR build verification (Docker build on PR to main/release-*) |
37: | `.github/workflows/lint.yml` | Go lint with golangci-lint (path-filtered) |
38: | `.github/workflows/codegen-check.yml` | Code generation drift check |
39: | `.github/workflows/test-coverage.yml` | Race-enabled coverage with Codecov |
40: | `.github/workflows/e2e.yml` | E2E on Kind with artifact collection |
41: | `.github/workflows/python-sdk-tests.yml` | Python SDK pytest |
42: | `.github/workflows/python-lint.yml` | Python Ruff lint |
43: | `.github/workflows/codespell.yml` | Spelling check |
44: | `.github/workflows/copyright-check.yml` | Copyright header check |
45: | `.github/workflows/build-push-release.yml` | Multi-arch image push to GHCR |
46: | `.github/workflows/dify-plugin-publish.yml` | Dify plugin publish workflow |
47: | `.github/workflows/workflows-approve.yml` | Workflow approval for contributors |
48: 
49: #### E2E Test Infrastructure (`test/e2e/`)
50: 
51: | File | Purpose |
52: |------|---------|

586: ## Implementation Order
587: 
588: ### Phase 1: Core Infrastructure (AR-043, AR-041a)
589: 1. **AR-043** (Session Store) — foundational dependency for router and workload manager
590: 2. **AR-041a** (CRD types, common types, API errors) — required for workload manager and router
591: 
592: ### Phase 2: Core Components (AR-041b, AR-042, AR-036, AR-038)
593: 3. **AR-041b** (Workload Manager core) — depends on AR-043, AR-041a
594: 4. **AR-042** (Session Routing) — depends on AR-043
595: 5. **AR-036** (PicoD) — independent core component
596: 6. **AR-038** (Idle Cleanup) — depends on AR-041a
597: 
598: ### Phase 3: Binaries and Deployment (AR-041c, AR-037)
599: 7. **AR-041c** (Workload Manager binary, GC, reconciler)
600: 8. **AR-037** (Dockerfiles, Helm chart, Makefile, CRDs, RBAC)
601: 
602: ### Phase 4: Higher-Level Tools (AR-040, AR-035, AR-039)
603: 9. **AR-040** (Python SDK) — depends on API design
604: 10. **AR-035** (CLI Toolkit) — depends on SDK and Docker/K8s integration
605: 11. **AR-039** (Integrations) — depends on SDK
606: 
607: ### Phase 5: CI/CD and Testing (AR-034)
608: 12. **AR-034** (CI/CD workflows, E2E tests) — integrates all components
609: 
610: ---
611: 
612: ## Key Interface Contracts
613: 
614: ### Store Interface (AR-043)
615: ```go
616: type Store interface {
617:     Ping(ctx context.Context) error
618:     GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
619:     StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
620:     UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
621:     DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
622:     ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
623:     ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
624:     UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
625:     Close() error
626: }
627: ```
628: 
629: ### Python SDK Public API (AR-040)
630: ```python
631: # agentcube/__init__.py
632: __all__ = ["CodeInterpreterClient", "AgentRuntimeClient"]
633: 
634: # agentcube/exceptions.py
635: class AgentCubeError(Exception): pass
636: class CommandExecutionError(AgentCubeError): pass
637: class SessionError(AgentCubeError): pass
638: class DataPlaneError(AgentCubeError): pass
639: ```
640: 
641: ### CLI Commands (AR-035)
642: - `pack`: Validate and prepare workspace
643: - `build`: Build container image (local Docker)
644: - `publish`: Deploy via agentcube (CR) or k8s (Deployment+Service)
645: - `invoke`: POST JSON to agent endpoint
646: - `status`: Display agent status
647: 
648: ### PicoD Endpoints (AR-036)
649: - `POST /api/execute`: Command execution
650: - `POST /api/files`: File upload (multipart or JSON base64)
651: - `GET /api/files?path=...`: File listing
652: - `GET /api/files/*path`: File download
653: - `GET /health`: Health check (no auth)
654: 
655: ### Workload Manager Routes (AR-041)
656: - `GET /health`: Health check
657: - `POST /v1/agent-runtime`: Create agent runtime sandbox
658: - `DELETE /v1/agent-runtime/sessions/:sessionId`: Delete sandbox
659: - `POST /v1/code-interpreter`: Create code interpreter
660: - `DELETE /v1/code-interpreter/sessions/:sessionId`: Delete code interpreter
661: 
662: ### Router Routes (AR-042)
663: - `GET /health/live`: Liveness probe
664: - `GET /health/ready`: Readiness probe
665: - `GET/POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path`: Agent invoke
666: - `GET/POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path`: Code interpreter invoke
667: 
668: ---
669:

# AgentCube — Implementation Plan (AR-034 through AR-043)

## Overview

This plan covers Architectural Requirements AR-034 through AR-043, building upon the foundation established by AR-001 through AR-033. These ARs focus on specific implementation details, edge cases, and extended functionality for each component.

## AR Mapping to Specs

| AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
|----|---------------|-----------------|
| AR-034 | `ci-cd/` | E2E test setup details, Kind cluster config, artifact collection |
| AR-035 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI error handling, metadata validation, Docker/K8s integration details |
| AR-036 | `code-execution/` | PicoD JWT auth, file operations, workspace security |
| AR-037 | `deployment/` | Helm chart templates, CRDs, RBAC, Docker build args |
| AR-038 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd reconciler, annotation parsing, deletion logic |
| AR-039 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer FastAPI integration |
| AR-040 | `python-sdk/` | SDK clients, HTTP transport, session management |
| AR-041 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRD types, workload manager handlers, GC |
| AR-042 | `session-routing/` | Router proxy, JWT injection, health endpoints |
| AR-043 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey providers, atomic operations, indexing |

<task_result>
# Architecture Record Summaries

---

## AR-034: CI/CD

### 1. Purpose and Scope
Automate validation on pull requests (build, lint, tests, codegen drift checks), publish container images on pushes to `main` and version tags, run end-to-end tests on Kind, exercise the Python SDK, and enforce spelling and copyright consistency.

### 2. Key Interfaces and Data Structures
| Workflow File | Trigger | Jobs | Key Operations |
|--------------|---------|------|----------------|
| `main.yml` | `pull_request` → `main`, `release-*` | `build` | Docker Buildx, `make docker-build` |
| `e2e.yml` | `pull_request` → `main`, `release-*` | `e2e-test` | Kind v0.30.0, `make e2e`, upload logs on failure |
| `lint.yml` | `pull_request` → `main`, `release-*` | `golangci` | Go 1.24, `make lint` |
| `python-sdk-tests.yml` | `pull_request`, `merge_group` | `python-sdk-tests` | Python 3.12, `pytest tests/ -v` |
| `test-coverage.yml` | `pull_request`, `merge_group`, `workflow_call` | `coverage` | `go test -race -v -coverprofile=coverage.out` |
| `codegen-check.yml` | `pull_request` → `main`, `release-*` | `codegen-check` | `make gen-check` |
| `copyright-check.yml` | `pull_request` → `main`, `release-*` | `build` | `make gen-copyright`, `git diff --exit-code` |
| `codespell.yml` | `pull_request` → `main`, `release-*` | `codespell` | codespell with `--check-filenames` |
| `build-push-release.yml` | `push` → `main`, tags `v*.*.*` | `build-and-push` | Multi-arch image push to ghcr.io |
| `workflows-approve.yml` | `pull_request_target` | `approve` | Auto-approve for repeat contributors |

### 3. Environment Variables Required
| Variable | Usage |
|----------|-------|
| `ARTIFACTS_PATH` | E2E log directory |
| `CODECOV_TOKEN` | Optional Codecov upload |
| `TAG` | Image tag (latest or git ref name) |
| `IMAGE_REGISTRY` | `ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}` |
| `GITHUB_TOKEN` | Registry login |
| `GH_TOKEN` | Cross-repo PR for dify-plugin |

### 4. File Structure Requirements
```
test/
├── e2e/
│   ├── run_e2e.sh                    # Main E2E entrypoint
│   ├── e2e_test.go                   # Go E2E tests
│   ├── test_codeinterpreter.py      # Python E2E tests
│   ├── echo_agent.yaml              # Echo AgentRuntime fixture
│   ├── e2e_code_interpreter.yaml     # CodeInterpreter fixture
│   └── e2e_code_interpreter_warmpool.yaml
manifests/charts/base/                # Helm chart for E2E install
docker/Dockerfile                     # Workload manager image
docker/Dockerfile.router              # Router image
docker/Dockerfile.picod              # PicoD image
```

### 5. Special Implementation Notes
- **Kind version**: v0.30.0 installed via `helm/kind-action@v1` with `install_only: true`
- **Agent-sandbox version**: v0.1.1 for E2E (URL-based CRD download)
- **Go versions**: E2E uses Go 1.23; other workflows use Go 1.24 or 1.24.4
- **Test commands**: Go tests via `go test -v ./test/e2e/...`; Python via `unittest.main()`
- **Image names**: `workloadmanager:latest`, `agentcube-router:latest`, `picod:latest` (loaded into Kind locally)
- **RBAC for E2E**: ServiceAccount `e2e-test` + ClusterRoleBinding to `workloadmanager` clusterrole

---

## AR-035: CLI Toolkit

### 1. Purpose and Scope
Command-line tool (`kubectl-agentcube`) for packaging, building, publishing, invoking, and checking status of AI agents against AgentCube or standard Kubernetes.

### 2. Key Interfaces and Data Structures

**CLI Commands:**
| Command | Purpose | Provider Options |
|---------|---------|------------------|
| `pack` | Validate workspace, merge CLI overrides into metadata, generate Dockerfile | `agentcube` |
| `build` | Build container image from packaged workspace using local Docker | `local` (default), `cloud` |
| `publish` | Deploy using AgentRuntime CR (`agentcube`) or Deployment+NodePort (`k8s`) | `agentcube`, `k8s` |
| `invoke` | POST JSON to published agent endpoint | `agentcube`, `k8s` |
| `status` | Display agent status in Rich Table | `agentcube`, `k8s` |

**Runtime Classes:**
- `PackRuntime`: Workspace validation, metadata creation, Dockerfile generation
- `BuildRuntime`: Local Docker build with version increment
- `PublishRuntime`: CR or K8s deployment
- `InvokeRuntime`: HTTP invocation with session header support
- `StatusRuntime`: Status retrieval from K8s or CR

**AgentMetadata (Pydantic):**
| Field | Type | Default |
|-------|------|---------|
| `agent_name` | `str` | required |
| `language` | `str` | `"python"` |
| `entrypoint` | `str` | required |
| `port` | `int` | `8080` |
| `build_mode` | `str` | `"local"` |
| `version` | `Optional[str]` | `None` |
| `image` | `Optional[Dict]` | `None` |
| `router_url` / `workload_manager_url` | `Optional[str]` | `None` |
| `session_id` | `Optional[str]` | `None` |
| `k8s_deployment` | `Optional[Dict]` | `None` |

**Kubernetes Providers:**
- `KubernetesProvider`: Standard K8s Deployment + NodePort Service
- `AgentCubeProvider`: AgentRuntime CR (`runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1`)

### 3. Environment Variables Required
| Variable | Usage |
|----------|-------|
| `ROUTER_URL` | For `provider=agentcube` |
| `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` | For `provider=agentcube` |
| `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` | Kubernetes namespace |

### 4. File Structure Requirements
```
cmd/cli/
├── pyproject.toml
├── agentcube/
│   ├── __init__.py              # __version__ = "0.1.0"
│   ├── cli/main.py              # Typer app, all commands
│   ├── models/pack_models.py     # MetadataOptions dataclass
│   ├── runtime/
│   │   ├── pack_runtime.py
│   │   ├── build_runtime.py
│   │   ├── publish_runtime.py
│   │   ├── invoke_runtime.py
│   │   └── status_runtime.py
│   └── services/
│       ├── metadata_service.py  # AgentMetadata, MetadataService
│       ├── docker_service.py    # DockerService

## AR-036: Code Execution (PicoD)

### 1. Purpose and Scope
PicoD is an HTTP daemon that runs commands inside a configurable workspace jail, manages workspace files, and exposes a health endpoint with JWT (RSA)-protected APIs.

### 2. Key Interfaces and Data Structures

**Execute API:**
```go
type ExecuteRequest struct {
    Command    []string          `json:"command" binding:"required"`
    Timeout    string            `json:"timeout"`        // Go duration format
    WorkingDir string            `json:"working_dir"`
    Env        map[string]string `json:"env"`
}
type ExecuteResponse struct {
    Stdout, Stderr string
    ExitCode       int
    Duration       float64
    StartTime, EndTime time.Time
}
```

**File APIs:**
```go
type FileInfo struct { Path, Size, Mode, Modified }
type UploadFileRequest struct { Path, Content (base64), Mode }
type FileEntry struct { Name, Size, Mode, IsDir, Modified }
type ListFilesResponse struct { Files []FileEntry }
```

**Health Response:**
```json
{"status": "ok", "service": "PicoD", "version": "0.0.1", "uptime": "..."}
```

**JWT Middleware:**
- Algorithm: RS256 (RSA signatures only, HS256 rejected)
- Options: `WithExpirationRequired`, `WithIssuedAt`, `WithLeeway(1 minute)`
- Body size cap: 32 MiB (`MaxBodySize`)

### 3. Environment Variables Required
| Variable | Constant | Purpose |
|----------|----------|---------|
| `PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY` | `PublicKeyEnvVar` | PEM-encoded RSA public key (required, fatal if missing) |

### 4. File Structure Requirements
```
cmd/picod/main.go              # CLI flags: -port, -workspace
pkg/picod/
├── auth.go                    # AuthManager, JWT middleware
├── execute.go                 # ExecuteHandler, ExecuteRequest/Response
├── files.go                   # Upload/List/Download handlers
└── server.go                  # Config, Server, Gin setup
```

### 5. Special Implementation Notes
- **Default timeout**: 60 seconds (not 30s despite comment)
- **Timeout exit code**: 124 (`TimeoutExitCode`)
- **Workspace security**: `sanitizePath` with symlink traversal protection
- **Multipart detection**: `Content-Type` prefix `multipart/form-data`
- **File modes**: Default `0644`, max `0777`
- **HTTP server**: `ReadHeaderTimeout: 10 seconds`
- **Port default**: 8080
- **No stdin from client**: Process stdin is not set from request body

## AR-038: Idle Cleanup

### 1. Purpose and Scope
Run a controller that deletes `Sandbox` custom resources when an idle-timeout annotation indicates the sandbox has been inactive beyond a fixed grace period.

### 2. Key Interfaces and Data Structures

**Reconciler:**
```go
type Reconciler struct {
    client.Client
    Scheme *runtime.Scheme
}
// Reconcile(ctx, req) -> (ctrl.Result, error)
```

**Algorithm:**
1. Get Sandbox by namespaced name
2. If not found, return empty result
3. Read `last-activity-time` annotation (key: `workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey`)
4. Parse RFC3339 timestamp; if error, `RequeueAfter: 30s`
5. Compute `expirationTime = lastActivity + 15 minutes`
6. If expired: delete Sandbox; handle NotFound as success
7. If not expired: `RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)`

**Annotation Keys (from `pkg/workloadmanager`):**
| Constant | Value | Usage |
|----------|-------|-------|
| `LastActivityAnnotationKey` | `"last-activity-time"` | Read by agentd |
| `IdleTimeoutAnnotationKey` | `"runtime.agentcube.io/idle-timeout"` | Set by workload manager |

### 3. Environment Variables Required
None (uses in-cluster config via `ctrl.GetConfigOrDie()`).

### 4. File Structure Requirements
```
cmd/agentd/main.go              # Manager setup, signal handling
pkg/agentd/
└── (reconciler logic)
pkg/workloadmanager/
└── (constants for annotation keys)
```

### 5. Special Implementation Notes
- **Timeout constant**: `SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute`
- **Manager options**: Metrics bind `0`, Health probe bind `0` (disabled)
- **Scheme registration**: Core K8s types + `sandboxv1alpha1` from `sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox`
- **Watch**: `For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{})` - no explicit Owns/Watches
- **Shutdown**: `mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler())` for graceful SIGTERM/SIGINT handling

## AR-040: Python SDK

### 1. Purpose and Scope
Python client library (`agentcube-sdk`) for creating Code Interpreter sessions via the Workload Manager (control plane) and executing code/files via the Router (data plane), plus invoking AgentRuntime workloads through the Router.

### 2. Key Interfaces and Data Structures

**Client Classes:**
| Class | Package | Purpose |
|-------|---------|---------|
| `CodeInterpreterClient` | `agentcube/code_interpreter.py` | Main SDK entry for Code Interpreter |
| `AgentRuntimeClient` | `agentcube/agent_runtime.py` | Main SDK entry for Agent Runtime |
| `ControlPlaneClient` | `agentcube/clients/control_plane.py` | Workload Manager HTTP |
| `CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient` | `agentcube/clients/code_interpreter_data_plane.py` | Router → Code Interpreter |
| `AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient` | `agentcube/clients/agent_runtime_data_plane.py` | Router → Agent Runtime |

**Control Plane API:**
| Method | Path | Body |
|--------|------|------|
| `POST` | `{base_url}/v1/code-interpreter` | `{"name", "namespace", "ttl", "metadata"}` |
| `DELETE` | `{base_url}/v1/code-interpreter/sessions/{session_id}` | - |

**Data Plane URLs (Code Interpreter):**
```
/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/code-interpreters/{cr_name}/invocations/
```
Endpoints: `api/execute`, `api/files`, `api/files/{path}`

**Data Plane URLs (Agent Runtime):**
```
/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/
```

**Exception Hierarchy:**
```python
class AgentCubeError(Exception): pass
class CommandExecutionError(AgentCubeError): ...
class SessionError(AgentCubeError): ...
class DataPlaneError(AgentCubeError): ...
```

### 3. Environment Variables Required
| Variable | Used By | Notes |
|----------|---------|-------|
| `ROUTER_URL` | `CodeInterpreterClient`, `AgentRuntimeClient` | Required if not passed as arg |
| `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` | `ControlPlaneClient` | Required if not passed as arg |
| `/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token` | `ControlPlaneClient` | Auto-read for in-cluster auth |

**Default Timeouts:**
| Setting | Default |
|---------|---------|
| `timeout` (read) | 120 seconds |
| `connect_timeout` | 5.0 seconds |
| `pool_connections` | 10 |
| `pool_maxsize` | 10 |

sdk-python/
├── pyproject.toml               # Package name: agentcube-sdk

## AR-041: Sandbox Orchestration

### 1. Purpose and Scope
Orchestrate agent sandboxes via Kubernetes CRDs (AgentRuntime, CodeInterpreter), a Gin HTTP API (workload manager), session persistence, garbage collection, and optional service-account authentication.

### 2. Key Interfaces and Data Structures

**CRDs (API group: `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh`, version: `v1alpha1`):**

| Kind | Scope | Subresource | Required Spec Fields |
|------|-------|-------------|---------------------|
| `AgentRuntime` | Namespaced | status | `targetPort[]`, `podTemplate`, `sessionTimeout` (default 15m), `maxSessionDuration` (default 8h) |
| `CodeInterpreter` | Namespaced | status | `template`, `ports[]`, `sessionTimeout`, `maxSessionDuration`, `authMode` (picod/none), `warmPoolSize` |

**Types:**
```go
type TargetPort struct {
    PathPrefix string `json:"pathPrefix,omitempty"`
    Name       string `json:"name,omitempty"`
    Port       uint32 `json:"port"`          // required
    Protocol   ProtocolType `json:"protocol"` // HTTP/HTTPS, default HTTP
}
type SandboxTemplate struct {
    Labels      map[string]string
    Annotations map[string]string
    Spec        corev1.PodSpec
}
type SandboxInfo struct {
    Kind, SandboxID, SandboxNamespace, Name, SessionID, Status string
    EntryPoints []SandboxEntryPoint
    CreatedAt, ExpiresAt time.Time
}
```

**HTTP Routes:**
| Method | Path | Auth | Handler |
|--------|------|------|---------|
| `GET` | `/health` | No | `{"status":"healthy"}` |
| `POST` | `/v1/agent-runtime` | If `EnableAuth` | Create sandbox |
| `DELETE` | `/v1/agent-runtime/sessions/:sessionId` | If `EnableAuth` | Delete sandbox |
| `POST` | `/v1/code-interpreter` | If `EnableAuth` | Create CodeInterpreter session |
| `DELETE` | `/v1/code-interpreter/sessions/:sessionId` | If `EnableAuth` | Delete sandbox |

**Store Interface:**
```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID) (*SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx, *SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx, *SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx, before, limit) ([]*SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx, before, limit) ([]*SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sessionID, at) error
    Close() error
}
```

**Constants:**
| Constant | Value |
|----------|-------|
| `DefaultSandboxTTL` | 8 hours |
| `DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout` | 15 minutes |
| `SessionIdLabelKey` | `runtime.agentcube.io/session-id` |
| `LastActivityAnnotationKey` | `last-activity-time` |

### 3. Environment Variables Required
| Variable | Usage |
|----------|-------|
| `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` | Overrides default namespace for identity secret |
| CLI flags: `-port`, `-runtime-class-name` (default `kuasar-vmm`), `-enable-tls`, `-tls-cert`, `-tls-key`, `-enable-auth` |

### 4. File Structure Requirements
```
pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/
├── groupversion_info.go         # Scheme registration
├── register.go                   # Kind constants
├── agent_type.go                # AgentRuntime, SandboxTemplate types
├── codeinterpreter_types.go     # CodeInterpreter types
pkg/common/types/
└── types.go                      # SandboxInfo, CreateSandboxRequest/Response
pkg/api/
└── errors.go                     # ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound, ErrCodeInterpreterNotFound
pkg/workloadmanager/
├── server.go                    # Gin engine, route registration
├── sandbox_reconciler.go        # SandboxReconciler
├── garbage_collector.go         # 15s tick, 2min timeout, batch 16
├── auth.go                      # TokenReview, LRU cache (1000, 5m TTL)
├── k8s_client.go                # K8sClient, GVR constants
└── workload_builder.go          # Sandbox/SandboxClaim building
cmd/workload-manager/main.go
```

### 5. Special Implementation Notes
- **Auth**: TokenReview via `authentication.k8s.io/v1`, LRU cache (1000 entries, 5 min TTL)
- **User client cache**: Key = `<namespace>:<serviceAccountName>`
- **Sandbox creation**: Watch registered before create, 2 minute wait for running state
- **GC tick**: 15 seconds interval, 2 minute context timeout, batch size 16
- **Pod name resolution**: Prefers `agents.x-k8s.io/sandbox-pod-name` annotation, fallback to label query
- **CodeInterpreter warm pool**: Creates `SandboxWarmPool` + `SandboxTemplate` when `WarmPoolSize > 0`
- **Identity secret**: `picod-router-identity` in namespace (from `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` or default)

## AR-042: Session Routing

### 1. Purpose and Scope
Route HTTP invocation traffic to sandboxes by session: resolve or create sessions via the workload manager, track activity in the store, reverse-proxy to pod endpoints, and sign outbound requests with JWT when targeting sandboxes.

### 2. Key Interfaces and Data Structures

**Config:**
```go
type Config struct {
    Port, Debug, EnableTLS, TLSCert, TLSKey string
    MaxConcurrentRequests int                // 0 = 1000 default
}
```

**Server:**
```go
type Server struct {
    config, engine, httpServer
    sessionManager SessionManager
    storeClient    store.Store
    httpTransport  *http.Transport
    jwtManager     *JWTManager
}
```

**SessionManager Interface:**
```go
type SessionManager interface {
    GetSandboxBySession(ctx, sessionID, namespace, name, kind) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
}
```

**JWT Constants:**
| Constant | Value |
|----------|-------|
| `rsaKeySize` | 2048 bits |
| `jwtExpiration` | 5 minutes |
| `IdentitySecretName` | `picod-router-identity` |
| Algorithm | RS256 |

**Routes:**
| Method | Path | Middleware | Handler |
|--------|------|-----------|---------|
| `GET` | `/health/live` | none | `{"status":"alive"}` |
| `GET` | `/health/ready` | none | `{"status":"ready"}` or 503 |
| `GET/POST` | `/v1/namespaces/:ns/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path` | Logger, Recovery, Concurrency | `handleAgentInvoke` |
| `GET/POST` | `/v1/namespaces/:ns/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path` | same | `handleCodeInterpreterInvoke` |

**Error Responses:**
| Condition | Status | Body |
|-----------|--------|------|
| `connection refused` | 502 | `{"error":"sandbox unreachable"}` |
| `timeout` | 504 | `{"error":"sandbox timeout"}` |
| Other proxy error | 502 | `{"error":"sandbox unreachable"}` |
| JWT signing failed | 500 | `{"code":"JWT_SIGNING_FAILED","error":"..."}` |
| No entry point | 404 | `{"error":"no entry point found for sandbox"}` |
| Overloaded | 429 | `{"error":"server overloaded, please try again later","code":"SERVER_OVERLOADED"}` |

### 3. Environment Variables Required
| Variable | Used By | Notes |
|----------|---------|-------|
| `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` | Session manager | Required (fails startup if missing) |
| `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` | JWT secret namespace | Default `default` |
| `/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token` | Session manager | Optional Bearer token for creates |

### 4. File Structure Requirements
```
cmd/router/main.go               # CLI flags parsing
pkg/router/
├── server.go                    # Server, Config, Gin setup
├── session_manager.go           # manager, workload client
├── jwt.go                       # JWTManager, key generation/storage
└── proxy.go                     # Reverse proxy logic
pkg/store/                       # Shared with workload manager
```

### 5. Special Implementation Notes
- **Concurrent request limit**: Default 1000, via buffered channel semaphore
- **HTTP/2**: `h2c` wrapping, `ReadIdleTimeout: 30s`, `PingTimeout: 15s`
- **Transport settings**: `MaxIdleConnsPerHost: 100`, `IdleConnTimeout: 0`
- **Last activity updates**: Called twice per successful invoke (before and after proxy)
- **JWT scope**: Only for `Sandbox` and `SandboxClaim` kinds (not CodeInterpreter)
- **Health readiness**: Returns 503 if `sessionManager` is nil
- **TLS requirement**: Both cert and key required if `EnableTLS` is true

## AR-043: Session Store

### 1. Purpose and Scope
Persist sandbox metadata keyed by session id, index sessions by expiry and last activity for garbage collection, and support Redis or Valkey backends selected by configuration.

### 2. Key Interfaces and Data Structures

**Store Interface:**
```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

**Key Patterns (both providers):**
| Purpose | Key |
|---------|-----|
| Session document | `session:{id}` |
| Expiry index (ZSET) | `session:expiry` |
| Last-activity index (ZSET) | `session:last_activity` |

**SandboxInfo Stored JSON:**
```go
type SandboxInfo struct {
    Kind, SandboxID, SandboxNamespace, Name, SessionID, Status string
    EntryPoints []SandboxEntryPoint
    CreatedAt, ExpiresAt time.Time
}
```

**Operations Summary:**
| Operation | Redis | Valkey |
|-----------|-------|--------|
| Ping | `PING` → `PONG` | `B().Ping()` → `PONG` |
| Store | Pipeline: `SETNX`, `ZADD` expiry, `ZADD` last_activity | `DoMulti`: same |
| Update | `SET key value XX` | `SET ... XX` → "OK" |
| Delete | Pipeline: `DEL`, `ZREM` both | `DoMulti`: same |
| List expired | `ZRANGEBYSCORE -inf {before.Unix} LIMIT 0 limit` | `Zrangebyscore` |
| List inactive | Same on `last_activity` | Same |
| Update activity | `GET` (exists), `ZADD` | `Exists`, `Zadd` |

### 3. Environment Variables Required

**Redis:**
| Variable | Required | Notes |
|----------|----------|-------|
| `REDIS_ADDR` | Yes | |
| `REDIS_PASSWORD` | Yes unless `REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false` | Case-insensitive compare to "false" |
| `STORE_TYPE` | No | Default `redis` |

**Valkey:**
| Variable | Required | Notes |
|----------|----------|-------|
| `VALKEY_ADDR` | Yes | Comma-separated → `InitAddress` |
| `VALKEY_PASSWORD` | Yes unless `VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false` | |
| `VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE` | No | `"true"` enables `DisableCache` |
| `VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE` | No | `"true"` enables `ForceSingleClient` |
| `STORE_TYPE` | Must be `valkey` | Case-insensitive |

### 4. File Structure Requirements
```
pkg/store/
├── store.go                     # Store interface, errors
├── singleton.go                 # Storage() singleton with sync.Once
├── store_redis.go               # Redis implementation
├── store_valkey.go              # Valkey implementation
└── (types from pkg/common/types)
```

### 5. Special Implementation Notes
- **Singleton pattern**: `sync.Once` ensures single initialization, `klog.Fatalf` on init failure
- **Atomic operations**: Store/Delete use pipeline/multi for atomicity
- **Orphan handling**: ZSET members without string keys are skipped during listing
- **Expiry score**: `float64(sandbox.ExpiresAt.Unix())`
- **Activity score**: `time.Now().Unix()` on store, provided timestamp on update
- **NotFound error**: `ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")`
- **Valkey MGET**: Keys should be in same slot (cluster consideration)
- **TTL semantics**: Redis `SETNX` ensures idempotent store; Valkey `DoMulti` for atomicity
</task_result>

<content>1: /*
2: Copyright 2024 Volcano-Sh.
3: 
4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
6: You may obtain a copy of the License at
7: 
8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
9: 
10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
11: distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14: limitations under the License.
15: */
16: 
17: package workloadmanager
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"context"
21: 	"crypto/tls"
22: 	"fmt"
23: 	"net/http"
24: 	"time"
25: 
26: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
27: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
28: )
29: 
30: type Server struct {
31: 	httpServer *http.Server
32: 	engine     *gin.Engine
33: 	config     *Config
34: 	auth       *AuthMiddleware
35: 	tokenCache *TokenCache
36: }
37: 
38: func NewServer(config *Config, auth *AuthMiddleware, cache *TokenCache) *Server {
39: 	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
40: 	engine := gin.New()
41: 	engine.Use(gin.Recovery())
42: 	engine.Use(klogMiddleware())
43: 
44: 	return &Server{
45: 		engine:     engine,
46: 		config:     config,
47: 		auth:       auth,
48: 		tokenCache: cache,
49: 	}
50: }
51: 
52: func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
53: 	s.engine.GET("/health", handleHealth)
54: 
55: 	runtime := s.engine.Group("/api/v1/runtime")
56: 	if s.config.EnableAuth {
57: 		runtime.Use(s.auth.Authenticate())
58: 	}
59: 	runtime.POST("/agentruntime", handleAgentRuntimeCreate)
60: 	runtime.POST("/codeinterpreter", handleCodeInterpreterCreate)
61: 	runtime.DELETE("/sandbox/:namespace/:name", handleDeleteSandbox)
62: }
63: 
64: func (s *Server) Start() error {
65: 	s.setupRoutes()
66: 
67: 	addr := fmt.Sprintf(":%d", s.config.Port)
68: 	s.httpServer = &http.Server{
69: 		Addr:         addr,
70: 		Handler:      s.engine,
71: 		ReadTimeout:  30 * time.Second,
72: 		WriteTimeout: 30 * time.Second,
73: 		IdleTimeout:  60 * time.Second,
74: 	}
75: 
76: 	klog.Infof("Starting workload manager server on %s", addr)
77: 
78: 	var err error
79: 	if s.config.EnableTLS {
80: 		tlsConfig := &tls.Config{
81: 			MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS12,
82: 		}
83: 		s.httpServer.TLSConfig = tlsConfig
84: 		err = s.httpServer.ListenAndServeTLS(s.config.TLSCert, s.config.TLSKey)
85: 	} else {
86: 		err = s.httpServer.ListenAndServe()
87: 	}
88: 
89: 	if err == http.ErrServerClosed {
90: 		klog.Info("Server stopped gracefully")
91: 		return nil
92: 	}
93: 	return err
94: }
95: 
96: func (s *Server) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
97: 	if s.httpServer == nil {
98: 		return nil
99: 	}
100: 	klog.Info("Shutting down workload manager server")
101: 	return s.httpServer.Shutdown(ctx)
102: }
103: 
104: func klogMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
105: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
106: 		start := time.Now()
107: 		path := c.Request.URL.Path
108: 
109: 		c.Next()
110: 
111: 		latency := time.Since(start)
112: 		status := c.Writer.Status()
113: 		klog.V(4).Infof("%s %s %d %v", c.Request.Method, path, status, latency)
114: 	}
115: }

(End of file - total 115 lines)

<content>1: /*
2: Copyright 2024 Volcano-Sh.

14: limitations under the License.
15: */
16: 
17: package router
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"context"
21: 	"crypto/tls"
22: 	"fmt"
23: 	"net"
24: 	"net/http"
25: 	"time"
26: 
27: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
28: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2"
29: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c"
30: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
31: 
32: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
33: )
34: 
35: const (
36: 	readHeaderTimeout = 5 * time.Second
37: 	readTimeout       = 30 * time.Second
38: 	writeTimeout      = 30 * time.Second
39: 	idleTimeout       = 120 * time.Second
40: )
41: 
42: func NewServer(ctx context.Context, cfg *Config, store store.Store) (*Server, error) {
43: 	if cfg.Debug {
44: 		gin.SetMode(gin.DebugMode)
45: 	} else {
46: 		gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
47: 	}
48: 
49: 	engine := gin.New()
50: 	engine.Use(gin.Recovery())
51: 	if cfg.Debug {
52: 		engine.Use(gin.Logger())
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	jwtManager, err := NewJWTManager(cfg.JWTKeySecretNamespace)
56: 	if err != nil {
57: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create JWT manager: %w", err)
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	sessionManager, err := NewSessionManager(ctx, store, jwtManager, cfg.WorkloadManagerURL)
61: 	if err != nil {
62: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create session manager: %w", err)
63: 	}
64: 
65: 	tlsConfig := &tls.Config{
66: 		MinVersion:       tls.VersionTLS12,
67: 		CurvePreferences: []tls.CurveID{tls.CurveP256, tls.X25519},
68: 		CipherSuites: []uint16{
69: 			tls.TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,
70: 			tls.TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,
71: 			tls.TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305,
72: 			tls.TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305,
73: 		},
74: 		GetCertificate: jwtManager.GetTLSCertificate,
75: 	}
76: 
77: 	srv := &Server{
78: 		config:     cfg,
79: 		engine:     engine,
80: 		sessionMgr: sessionManager,
81: 		jwtManager: jwtManager,
82: 		store:      store,
83: 		tlsConfig:  tlsConfig,
84: 		shutdownCh: make(chan struct{}),
85: 	}
86: 
87: 	srv.registerRoutes()
88: 	srv.setupHTTPServer()
89: 	srv.setupHTTP2Server()
90: 
91: 	return srv, nil
92: }
93: 
94: func (s *Server) registerRoutes() {
95: 	s.engine.GET("/health/live", s.handleHealthLive)
96: 	s.engine.GET("/health/ready", s.handleHealthReady)
97: 	s.engine.POST("/agent/invoke", s.handleAgentInvoke)
98: 	s.engine.POST("/code-interpreter/invoke", s.handleCodeInterpreterInvoke)
99: }
100: 
101: func (s *Server) setupHTTPServer() {
102: 	s.httpServer = &http.Server{
103: 		Addr:              fmt.Sprintf(":%d", s.config.Port),
104: 		Handler:           h2c.NewHandler(s.engine, &http2.Server{}),
105: 		ReadHeaderTimeout: readHeaderTimeout,
106: 		ReadTimeout:       readTimeout,
107: 		WriteTimeout:      writeTimeout,
108: 		IdleTimeout:       idleTimeout,
109: 		TLSConfig:         s.tlsConfig,
110: 	}
111: }
112: 
113: func (s *Server) setupHTTP2Server() {
114: 	s.http2Server = &http2.Server{
115: 		MaxConcurrentStreams: 250,
116: 		MaxReadFrameSize:     1048576,
117: 		IdleTimeout:          idleTimeout,
118: 	}
119: 
120: 	listener, err := net.Listen("tcp", fmt.Sprintf(":%d", s.config.Port+1))
121: 	if err != nil {
122: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to create HTTP/2 listener on port %d: %v", s.config.Port+1, err)
123: 		return
124: 	}
125: 
126: 	s.http2Server.ServeTLS(listener, "", "")
127: }
128: 
129: func (s *Server) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
130: 	klog.Infof("Starting server on port %d", s.config.Port)
131: 
132: 	go func() {
133: 		if err := s.httpServer.ListenAndServeTLS("", ""); err != nil && err != http.ErrServerClosed {
134: 			klog.Errorf("HTTP server error: %v", err)
135: 		}
136: 	}()
137: 
138: 	s.wg.Add(1)
139: 	go func() {
140: 		defer s.wg.Done()
141: 		<-ctx.Done()
142: 		klog.Info("Context cancelled, initiating shutdown")
143: 		close(s.shutdownCh)
144: 	}()
145: 
146: 	return nil
147: }
148: 
149: func (s *Server) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
150: 	var err error
151: 	s.shutdownOnce.Do(func() {
152: 		klog.Info("Shutting down server")
153: 
154: 		shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 30*time.Second)
155: 		defer cancel()
156: 
157: 		if s.httpServer != nil {
158: 			if shutdownErr := s.httpServer.Shutdown(shutdownCtx); shutdownErr != nil {
159: 				err = fmt.Errorf("HTTP server shutdown error: %w", shutdownErr)
160: 			}
161: 		}
162: 
163: 		if s.http2Server != nil {
164: 			s.http2Server.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
165: 		}
166: 
167: 		s.wg.Wait()
168: 		klog.Info("Server shutdown complete")
169: 	})
170: 	return err
171: }

16: 
17: package picod
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"net/http"
21: 	"os"
22: 	"time"
23: 
24: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
25: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
26: )
27: 
28: type Server struct {
29: 	engine       *gin.Engine
30: 	config       *Config
31: 	authManager  *AuthManager
32: 	startTime    time.Time
33: 	workspaceDir string
34: }
35: 
36: func NewServer(config *Config) *Server {
37: 	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
38: 	engine := gin.New()
39: 	engine.Use(gin.Logger(), gin.Recovery())
40: 
41: 	authManager := NewAuthManager()
42: 	authManager.LoadPublicKeyFromEnv()
43: 
44: 	server := &Server{
45: 		engine:       engine,
46: 		config:       config,
47: 		authManager:  authManager,
48: 		startTime:    time.Now(),
49: 		workspaceDir: config.Workspace,
50: 	}
51: 
52: 	if server.workspaceDir == "" {
53: 		server.workspaceDir, _ = os.Getwd()
54: 	}
55: 
56: 	server.setupRoutes()
57: 
58: 	return server
59: }
60: 
61: func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
62: 	s.engine.GET("/health", HealthCheckHandler(s.startTime))
63: 
64: 	api := s.engine.Group("/api")
65: 	api.Use(s.authManager.AuthMiddleware())
66: 	{
67: 		api.POST("/execute", ExecuteHandler(s.workspaceDir))
68: 		api.GET("/files/*path", ListFilesHandler(s.workspaceDir))
69: 		api.GET("/files/*path/download", DownloadFileHandler(s.workspaceDir))
70: 		api.POST("/files/upload", handleMultipartUpload(s.workspaceDir))
71: 		api.POST("/files/upload-base64", handleJSONBase64Upload(s.workspaceDir))
72: 	}
73: }
74: 
75: func (s *Server) Run() error {
76: 	addr := ":" + string(rune(s.config.Port))
77: 	klog.Infof("Starting PicoD server on port %d", s.config.Port)
78: 	return s.engine.Run(addr)
79: }
80: 
81: func (s *Server) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
82: 	s.engine.ServeHTTP(w, r)
83: }

<content>1: // Copyright 2024 Volcano Authors

14: 
15: package agentd
16: 
17: import (
18: 	"context"
19: 	"time"
20: 
21: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
22: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
23: 	ctrl "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime"
24: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
25: 
26: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
27: 
28: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/workloadmanager"
29: )
30: 
31: const SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
32: 
33: type Reconciler struct {
34: 	client.Client
35: 	Scheme *runtime.Scheme
36: }
37: 
38: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
39: 	logger := ctrl.LoggerFrom(ctx)
40: 
41: 	sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
42: 	err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox)
43: 	if err != nil {
44: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
45: 			return ctrl.Result{}, nil
46: 		}
47: 		return ctrl.Result{}, err
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	annotationValue, exists := sandbox.Annotations[workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey]
51: 	if !exists || annotationValue == "" {
52: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, annotationValue)
56: 	if err != nil {
57: 		logger.Error(err, "failed to parse last activity annotation", "value", annotationValue)
58: 		return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, nil
59: 	}
60: 
61: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
62: 	if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
63: 		logger.Info("deleting expired sandbox", "name", req.Name, "namespace", req.Namespace)
64: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
65: 			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
66: 				return ctrl.Result{}, nil
67: 			}
68: 			return ctrl.Result{}, err
69: 		}
70: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
71: 	}
72: 
73: 	return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
74: }
75: 
76: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {
77: 	return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
78: 		For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).
79: 		Complete(r)
80: }

</content>

metadata.preview:
package store

import (
	"context"
	"time"

	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
)

type Store interface {
	Ping(ctx context.Context) error
	GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
	UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
	DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
	ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
	Close() error
}

package main

import (
	"context"
	"flag"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/workloadmanager"
	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
)

func main() {
	port := flag.String("port", "8080", "Port for the Workload Manager server to listen on")
	runtimeClassName := flag.String("runtime-class-name", "kuasar-vmm", "Runtime class name for sandboxes")
	enableTLS := flag.Bool("enable-tls", false, "Enable TLS")
	tlsCert := flag.String("tls-cert", "", "TLS certificate path")
	tlsKey := flag.String("tls-key", "", "TLS key path")
